{{nihongo|'''Kawata Shrine (Tonmiya Village)'''|川田神社（頓宮村）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawata Shrine (Tonmiya Village)'''|川田神社（頓宮村）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawata Shrine (Tonmiya Village)'''|川田神社（頓宮村）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawata Shrine (Tonmiya Village)'''|川田神社（頓宮村）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].
